scene1_tbone.description: T-bone collision: vehicle A traveling north strikes vehicle B traveling east at intersection

required_checks.description: Both vehicles must be clearly visible and identifiable in frame
required_checks.validation: object_count >= 2 vehicles in render, no vehicle occluded > 50%

required_checks.description: Collision impact point must be clearly visible and centered in frame
required_checks.validation: impact zone in center 50% of frame, deformation/contact visible

required_checks.description: Road intersection must provide spatial context and orientation
required_checks.validation: road markings or curbs visible, minimum 2 roads visible

required_checks.description: Both approach paths must be demonstrable; viewer can understand vehicle trajectories
required_checks.validation: clear road segments visible from both directions

required_checks.description: Impact damage must be visible on at least one vehicle (deformation, contact marks)
required_checks.validation: visible deformation or collision indicators present

required_checks.description: Collision zone must be adequately lit to show impact details
required_checks.validation: mean brightness in impact zone > 120/255

required_checks.description: No Z-fighting or interpenetration visible between vehicles
required_checks.validation: vehicles intersect at impact but no flickering or tearing

BirdEye.description: Entire intersection must fit in frame
Both vehicle approach paths clearly visible and distinct
BirdEye.validation: minimum 100 units of road visible in each direction

BirdEye.description: Angle of collision and impact vector must be evident
BirdEye.validation: vehicles' pre-collision trajectories inferrable from positions

BirdEye.description: Scale bar must be visible in overhead angle

DriverA_POV.description: Vehicle A dashboard and steering wheel visible in frame
Vehicle B must be visible through windshield approaching from side
DriverA_POV.validation: Vehicle B appears in frame 30-50% from center

DriverA_POV.description: Traffic signals, lane markings, or other vehicles present if stated

DriverB_POV.description: Vehicle A approaching head-on or in field of view
DriverB_POV.validation: Vehicle A in frame, clearly approaching
no excessive glare or opacity in windshield

Wide.description: Wide shot showing full intersection and surrounding area
Wide.validation: minimum 3 road segments visible, intersection center in frame

Wide.description: Measurement scale bar visible in foreground or corner
Street signs, buildings, or landmarks providing scale context
Both vehicles fully or mostly unoccluded for identification

scene2_pedestrian.description: Vehicle-pedestrian collision at crosswalk; pedestrian struck by vehicle

required_checks.description: Pedestrian figure must be clearly human-shaped and identifiable
required_checks.validation: visible head, torso, limbs with realistic proportions

required_checks.description: Vehicle must be clearly a vehicle, not abstract or geometric
required_checks.validation: visible wheels, windows, doors, or other vehicle-specific features

required_checks.description: Crosswalk markings must be clearly visible
required_checks.validation: painted stripes or crosswalk markings visible on road

required_checks.description: Spatial relationship between pedestrian and vehicle at impact must be clear
required_checks.validation: contact point obvious, pedestrian position relative to vehicle evident

required_checks.description: Pedestrian positioned realistically on or crossing road
required_checks.validation: pedestrian on crosswalk or adjacent to road edge

required_checks.description: Demonstrates whether driver had clear sight line to pedestrian
required_checks.validation: driver POV shows or blocks pedestrian; visibility factors evident

required_checks.description: Pedestrian and impact zone adequately lit for visibility assessment
required_checks.validation: mean brightness > 100/255 in pedestrian area

DriverPOV.description: Dashboard and steering wheel visible in frame

DriverPOV.validation: windshield frame visible, wipers if present

DriverPOV.description: Clearly show whether pedestrian was in driver's line of sight
DriverPOV.validation: pedestrian visible or demonstrably hidden by vehicle/environment

DriverPOV.description: Traffic signals visible if relevant to visibility claim
DriverPOV.validation: traffic light state clear or not visible (supporting testimony)

Crosswalk.description: Crosswalk markings must be clearly visible and readable
Crosswalk.validation: painted stripes unambiguous, at least 3 stripes visible

Crosswalk.description: Pedestrian positioned on or crossing marked crosswalk
Approaching roads and traffic context visible
If applicable, demonstrate sight obstructions (parked cars, vegetation)
Crosswalk.validation: any obstructions clearly present and positioned

Wide.description: Entire intersection area visible with pedestrian and vehicle
Wide.validation: intersection fully in frame, both parties unoccluded

Wide.description: Pedestrian scale to environment clearly demonstrated
Wide.validation: scale reference or environmental context shows human size

Wide.description: Any environmental hazards (parked vehicles, obstacles) visible

scene3_highway.description: Multi-vehicle highway collision; vehicle pursuit or high-speed impact

required_checks.description: All involved vehicles clearly identifiable and distinct
required_checks.validation: each vehicle has distinct color/markings, minimum 2 vehicles visible

required_checks.description: Highway lane markings clearly visible
required_checks.validation: center line and edge lines visible, minimum 2 lanes shown

required_checks.description: Direction of traffic flow and vehicle approach paths clear
required_checks.validation: lane position and direction unambiguous for all vehicles

required_checks.description: Motion or speed indicators visible (motion blur, distance between frames)
required_checks.validation: motion blur visible or trajectory inference possible

required_checks.description: Impact damage or contact between vehicles evident
required_checks.validation: visible deformation, contact marks, or positioning showing collision

required_checks.description: Highway infrastructure providing context (signs, mile markers, exits)
required_checks.validation: at least 2 infrastructure elements visible

required_checks.description: All key elements adequately lit and visible
required_checks.validation: mean brightness > 100/255, all vehicles > 60% visible

Aerial.description: Highway lanes and markings clearly visible from above
Aerial.validation: all lanes in collision area visible, marking pattern clear

Aerial.description: Pre-collision trajectories of all vehicles inferrable

Aerial.validation: impact area occupies center 40% of frame

Aerial.description: Scale bar visible for distance measurement

Side.description: Vehicle side profiles clearly visible and identifiable
Relative positions and spacing between vehicles evident
Side.validation: vehicles' distances and relative motion clear

Side.description: Point of contact between vehicles visible
Each vehicle's lane position clearly shown
Side.validation: lane markings visible beside each vehicle

Chase.description: Lead vehicle clearly visible and identifiable from rear
Chase.validation: rear profile, license plate area, windows visible

Chase.description: Following/striking vehicle clearly visible and identifiable
Chase.validation: headlights, front end visible, identity clear

Chase.description: Distance and spacing between vehicles clear
Road markings and lane position visible in chase view

scene4_parking.description: Parking lot collision (low speed) or surveillance scenario; nighttime lighting

required_checks.description: Scene clearly reads as nighttime with appropriate darkness
required_checks.validation: mean background brightness < 50/255, artificial lights visible

required_checks.description: Street lights, parking lights, or vehicle lights casting visible light pools
required_checks.validation: minimum 2 light sources with visible cone or pool

required_checks.description: If security camera angle: positioning and angle match real camera placement
required_checks.validation: camera at reasonable mounting height (8-15 feet), unobstructed view

required_checks.description: Vehicles clearly identifiable despite nighttime conditions
required_checks.validation: vehicle outlines, lights, colors discernible

required_checks.description: Parking space lines or lot structure visible
required_checks.validation: at least 2 parking space lines or lot structure visible

required_checks.description: Impact damage visible despite nighttime lighting
required_checks.validation: contact zone mean brightness > 40/255, damage discernible

required_checks.description: Headlights visible without overexposure; no blown-out halos
required_checks.validation: light halos < 10% of image, interior detail visible

SecurityCam.description: Camera angle must remain fixed (no panning/tilting during action)
SecurityCam.validation: frame does not shift; horizon remains stable

SecurityCam.description: Camera height consistent with real security camera placement
SecurityCam.validation: camera at 8-15 feet height, looking slightly downward

SecurityCam.description: Field of view consistent with wide-angle security lens
SecurityCam.validation: visible area > 100 feet width in scene

SecurityCam.description: If fisheye camera: distortion consistent and realistic
SecurityCam.validation: edges show appropriate barrel distortion or straight (non-fisheye)

WideNight.description: Parking lot structure and context visible
WideNight.validation: minimum 5 parking spaces or significant lot area visible

WideNight.description: Light distribution from lamp poles realistic
WideNight.validation: light pools appropriately positioned and sized

WideNight.description: Both vehicles fully in frame, unoccluded
Surrounding buildings, trees, or structures visible for orientation

CloseUp.description: Damage or contact point clearly visible and detailed
Damage zone adequately lit to show details
License plate, VIN area, or identifying marks visible
Background is secondary; damage is focus

scene5_rural.description: Rural/highway collision with minimal infrastructure; daytime

required_checks.description: Both vehicles clearly visible in open landscape
required_checks.validation: vehicles unoccluded, visible against sky/ground

required_checks.description: Road type (paved vs. unpaved) clearly evident
required_checks.validation: road surface texture and type distinguishable

required_checks.description: Landscape context (fields, hills, vegetation) visible for orientation
required_checks.validation: natural features and horizon visible, providing scale

required_checks.description: Scale reference visible (measurement bar or environmental scale)
required_checks.validation: metric scale visible or inferrable from known elements

required_checks.description: Weather conditions clear (sunny, cloudy, wet, etc.)
required_checks.validation: sky and lighting conditions match scenario

required_checks.description: If applicable, sight distance clearly demonstrable
required_checks.validation: visibility conditions show driver sight lines

Aerial.description: Full collision context visible from above
Aerial.validation: approach roads, impact zone, surrounding area all in frame
terrain features help establish spatial relationships

Aerial.description: Vehicle approach trajectories inferrable from positions
Aerial.validation: vehicles positioned to show approach paths

Ground.description: Vehicle approach paths and speeds inferrable
Natural landmarks or structures for context
Ground.validation: trees, buildings, or terrain features visible

global_checks.description: Case number and exhibit reference visible in frame
global_checks.validation: text visible, readable, in English, format: 'Case #XXXX-XXXX Exhibit A-N'

global_checks.description: Measurement scale bar (ruler/scale reference) clearly visible in frame
global_checks.validation: metric scale 1M minimum, clearly labeled, readable

global_checks.description: DEMONSTRATIVE AID disclaimer text visible and readable
global_checks.validation: text present, format: 'DEMONSTRATIVE AID - NOT TO SCALE' or similar

global_checks.description: Zero objects with unmodified Blender default grey material
global_checks.validation: mean color of all visible objects not (127,127,127)

global_checks.description: Render resolution adequate for forensic detail viewing
Render aspect ratio appropriate for intended use
global_checks.validation: 16:9 for video/presentation, 4:3 for courtroom display (confirm with counsel)

global_checks.description: No studio watermarks, logos, or identifying marks on render
Render file includes metadata (case number, date, animator)
global_checks.validation: exif data or render properties contain case reference

global_checks.description: Vehicle colors and material colors match real reference photos
global_checks.validation: color comparison document signed off by subject matter expert

global_checks.description: Geometry dimensions match real-world vehicle/location measurements
global_checks.validation: dimensional verification document signed off (CAD compare or tape measure)

global_checks.description: Animation is smooth and continuous without jumps or discontinuities
global_checks.validation: playback speed 24fps or 30fps; no frame drops; temporal consistency

global_checks.description: If camera moves: motion is smooth and follows proper cinematography
global_checks.validation: no jittery motion, arc or dolly movement smooth

global_checks.description: If video includes audio: disclaimers about sound design (if not from scene)
global_checks.validation: opening/closing text: 'Audio is reconstructed for educational clarity'
